role_title: Director, Strategy & Operations - Dasher and Logistics

location.office_time_required: some time in-office and some time remote

level_signals: 10+ years of experience in strategy, operations, consulting, technology, finance, or a related field
Experience leading managers or senior leaders
Director title with a team of senior managers and operators
Comp range $197,200–$290,000 base, consistent with Director-level at DoorDash

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 10+ years of experience in strategy, operations, consulting, technology, finance, or a related field, and experience leading managers or senior leaders
experience leading managers or senior leaders
You have owned large, complex business areas with clear accountability for financial and operational results
You have experience building data-driven strategies and translating insights into measurable execution plans
You are comfortable influencing senior executives and aligning cross-functional partners around shared goals
You have experience building and developing high-performing, inclusive teams

scope.team_size_estimate: team of senior managers and operators (exact headcount unclear)
scope.surface: Dasher & Logistics — cost management, incremental revenue, delivery quality, efficiency, and/or fulfillment capacity
scope.business_model: marketplace / logistics platform (delivery as a service, B2C and B2B)
core_responsibilities: Own end-to-end business outcomes, including cost per order, delivery quality, efficiency, fulfillment rate, and/or incremental revenue generation
Define the strategy for your organization and translate it into clear goals, measurable milestones, and accountable owners
Partner cross-functionally with Product, Engineering, Finance, and Operations leaders to align on priorities and deliver shared outcomes
Serve as the escalation point for complex issues, proactively identify risks, and adjust plans to keep goals on track
Build and develop a team of leaders, creating clarity, accountability, and strong engagement across your organization

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and competitive ($197,200–$290,000 base)
Equity grants explicitly mentioned as part of compensation
Clear ownership area with specific metrics (cost per order, fulfillment rate, delivery quality)
Reports to Senior Director — clear reporting chain stated
Comprehensive benefits package described in detail
Diversity and inclusion commitment explicitly stated
red_flags: Hybrid policy is vague — 'some time in-office and some time remote' provides no specific percentage or frequency
No specific cities listed for this role despite hybrid designation, making commute expectations unclear
Visa sponsorship not mentioned — unclear for international candidates
Extremely wide salary band ($92,800 spread) may reflect significant location-based pay differentiation

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title, reports structure, comp range, and 10+ years requirement)
scope.team_size_estimate (inferred from 'team of senior managers and operators'; exact count not stated)
scope.business_model (inferred from company description and product context)
scope.primary_metrics_inferred (inferred from responsibilities; listed verbatim but framed as metrics)

compensation.location_pay_differential (inferred from 'Base salary is localized according to an employee's work location')
